headlines.title: Cottonwood Fire Chars Utah
headlines.summary: The blaze burned more than 150 square miles and swept through parts of a ski resort.

headlines.title: NASA Transfers ‘Hundred Acre Wood’ to Patuxent Research Refuge
headlines.summary: NASA ceremonially transferred ownership of about 105 acres of wooded land at its Goddard Space Flight Center’s Greenbelt, Maryland, campus Tuesday to the adjoining Patuxent Research Refuge, managed by the U.S. Fish and W
